name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Worm Events
notes: Edit this BB to define worm events. This BB only applies to events not detected by a custom rule.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Worm Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Exploit.Worm Active
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of EventCRE
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Worm Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Exploit.Worm Active
AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of EventCRE
